news.t: Franklin Templeton Announces Name Change to Two Tax-Free Bond ETFs

overview.description: The Franklin Dynamic Municipal Bond ETF (FLMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in municipal bonds of any credit quality. The portfolio manager seeks dollar-weighted average maturity of three to ten years. FLMI was launched on Aug 31, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton's Jennifer Johnston on muni bonds: Buy bonds with robust security provisions
data.text: Jennifer Johnston, SVP and director of municipal bond research Franklin Templeton, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss the tax advantage nature of MUNI investments, shifting investments from treasuries to...

data.title: Franklin Templeton Announces Name Change to Two Tax-Free Bond ETFs
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton Announces Name Change to Two Tax-Free Bond ETFs
